title: Farming And Friends
description: 🌱 100+ crops • 🤖Automatization • 🐟 Fishing  • 🕯️ Cozy • 🌳 Biomes• 🍺Beer • 🍷Wine • ✨shaders |✅ Play Now With Friends
body: ![Farming&Freinds - Play Now ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c1c1b4e33264018e65082da110e2738c0436ed2.webp) # ✅ Summary This modpack offers a cozy and chill farming experience with vast improvements, including 100+ new crops and farming automation. You can also enjoy social features like playing with friends, alongside beer drinking and wine making. - 🌾 **100+ New Crops** >Expand your agricultural horizons with a huge variety of new plants to cultivate. - 🤖 **Farming Automatization** >Streamline your farming operations with automated systems. - 🍺 **Beer Drinking** >Enjoy a refreshing pint of beer within the game. - 🍷 **Wine Making** >Craft your own fine wines. - 🌳 **Beautiful Biomes** >Explore stunning and diverse natural environments. - 🐟 **Fishing** >Cast a line and catch various fish. - 🕯️ **Cozy&Chill** >Experience a relaxed and enjoyable gameplay atmosphere. - ✨ **Breath Taking Shaders** >Enhance your visual experience with incredible graphic effects. - 🌐 **Play With Friends** >Connect and play together with your friends. # 📊 Additional Info - 🔍Check Out **[Gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/farming-and-friends/gallery)** For More Images - 💬Join Our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/uSzRGWqgn3)** - ⚡Fully Optimized With Shader Support (3Gb Ram Min.) - 💡Recommended Server Hosting -> **[Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=6876)** - 📦Included projects are in version tabs; click the version. # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
